moves.name: Endure Harm
moves.trigger: When you face physical damage, suffer -health equal to your foe's rank or as appropriate to the situation. If your health is 0, suffer -momentum equal to any remaining -health. Then, roll +health or +iron, whichever is higher.
moves.strong:
You endure -harm health. Choose one:
  • Shake it off: If your health is greater than 0, suffer -1 momentum in exchange for +1 health.
  • Embrace the pain: Take +1 momentum.
moves.weak: You endure -harm health. You press on. No additional penalty.
moves.miss: You endure -harm health. Also suffer −1 momentum. If you are at 0 health, you must mark wounded or maimed (if currently unmarked) or roll on the Endure Extreme Harm oracle.
moves.notes: Triggered every time you take harm — not just in combat. If health hits 0 on a miss, mark Wounded or Maimed (if unmarked) or roll the table below. Debilities reduce your stats. This is how characters die.

table.value: The harm is mortal. Face Death.
You are dying. You need to Heal within an hour or two, or Face Death.
You are unconscious and out of action. If left alone, you come back to your senses in an hour or two. If you are vulnerable to a foe not inclined to show mercy, Face Death.

You are reeling and fighting to stay conscious. If you engage in any vigorous activity (such as running or fighting) before taking a breather for a few minutes, roll on this table again (before resolving the other move).
You are battered but still standing.

moves.name: Companion Endure Harm
moves.triggerShort: When your companion faces physical damage.
moves.trigger: When your companion faces physical damage, they suffer −health equal to the amount of harm inflicted. If your companion's health is 0, exchange any leftover −health for −momentum. Then, roll +heart or +your companion's health, whichever is higher.
moves.strong: Your companion rallies. Give them +1 health.
moves.weak: Your companion is battered. If their health is 0, they cannot assist you until they gain at least +1 health.
moves.miss: Also suffer −1 momentum. If your companion's health is 0, they are gravely wounded and out of action. Without aid, they die in an hour or two. If you roll a miss with a 1 on your action die, and your companion's health is 0, they are now dead. Take 1 experience for each marked ability on your companion asset, and remove it.
moves.notes: Roll +heart or +companion health, whichever is higher. A dead companion (miss with action die 1 at 0 health) is permanent — remove the asset and gain experience equal to its marked abilities.

moves.name: Face Death
moves.triggerShort: When you are brought to the brink of death.
moves.trigger: When you are brought to the brink of death, and glimpse the world beyond, roll +heart.
moves.strong: Death rejects you. You are cast back into the mortal world.
moves.weak:
Choose one:
  • You die, but not before making a noble sacrifice. Envision your final moments.
  • Death desires something of you in exchange for your life. Envision what it wants (Ask the Oracle if unsure), and Swear an Iron Vow (formidable or extreme) to complete that quest. If you fail to score a hit when you Swear an Iron Vow, or refuse the quest, you are dead. Otherwise, you return to the mortal world and are now cursed. You may only clear the cursed debility by completing the quest.
moves.notes: Triggered when health reaches 0 and you fail Endure Harm (or choose to Face Death directly). On a weak hit you can choose a noble sacrifice or accept a death-quest — the quest marks you cursed until completed.

moves.name: Face a Setback
moves.triggerShort: When your momentum is at -6 and you suffer additional -momentum.
moves.trigger:
When your momentum is at its minimum (-6), and you suffer additional -momentum, choose one.
  • Exchange each additional -momentum for any combination of -health, -spirit, or -supply as appropriate to the circumstances.
  • Envision an event or discovery (Ask the Oracle if unsure) which undermines your progress in a current quest, journey, or fight. Then, for each additional -momentum, clear 1 unit of progress on that track per its rank (troublesome = clear 3 progress; dangerous = clear 2 progress; formidable = clear 1 progress; extreme = clear 2 ticks; epic = clear 1 tick).
moves.notes: No roll — automatically triggered when momentum is already at -6 and you would suffer more -momentum. You must absorb the overflow as either stat damage or progress loss. This is how bad situations spiral.

moves.name: Endure Stress
moves.triggerShort: When you face mental shock or despair.
moves.trigger: When you face mental shock or despair, suffer −spirit equal to your foe's rank or as appropriate to the situation. If your spirit is 0, suffer −momentum equal to any remaining −spirit. Then roll +heart or +spirit, whichever is higher.
moves.strong:
You endure -harm spirit. Choose one:
  • Shake it off: If your spirit is greater than 0, suffer −1 momentum in exchange for +1 spirit.
  • Embrace the darkness: Take +1 momentum.
moves.weak: You endure -harm spirit. You press on.
moves.miss: You endure -harm spirit. Also suffer −1 momentum. If you are at 0 spirit, you must mark shaken or corrupted (if currently unmarked) or roll on the Endure Extreme Stress oracle.
moves.notes: The spirit equivalent of Endure Harm. Roll +heart or +spirit, whichever is higher. If spirit hits 0 on a miss, mark Shaken or Corrupted (if unmarked) or roll the table below.

table.value: You are overwhelmed. Face Desolation.
You give up. Forsake Your Vow (if possible, one relevant to your current crisis).
You give in to a fear or compulsion, and act against your better instincts.

moves.name: Face Desolation
moves.triggerShort: When you are brought to the brink of desolation.
moves.trigger: When you are brought to the brink of desolation, roll +heart.
moves.weak:
Choose one:
  • Your spirit or sanity breaks, but not before you make a noble sacrifice. Envision your final moments.
  • You see a vision of a dreaded event coming to pass. Envision that dark future (Ask the Oracle if unsure), and Swear an Iron Vow (formidable or extreme) to prevent it. If you fail to score a hit when you Swear an Iron Vow, or refuse the quest, you are lost. Otherwise, you return to your senses and are now tormented. You may only clear the tormented debility by completing the quest.
moves.miss: You succumb to despair or horror and are lost.
moves.notes: The spirit equivalent of Face Death. Triggered when spirit reaches 0 and Endure Stress fails. On a weak hit you can choose a noble sacrifice or accept a quest to prevent a dark future — the quest marks you tormented until completed.

moves.name: Out of Supply
moves.trigger: When your supply is exhausted (reduced to 0), mark unprepared. If you suffer additional -supply while unprepared, you must exchange each additional -supply for any combination of -health, -spirit, or -momentum as appropriate to the circumstances.
moves.notes: No roll — automatically triggered when supply hits 0. You immediately mark the unprepared debility. Any further -supply costs must be absorbed as -health, -spirit, or -momentum.
